meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve no version control (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Master Version Control for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Learn to debug with AI, overcoming the lack of version control in your projects using Antigravity and Claude Code. A high-efficiency guide for freelancers.
content.answer_block: When version control is absent, you must treat your codebase as a snapshot-in-time state machine. Use Claude Code to map dependency chains and Antigravity to simulate state changes. By isolating functions into idempotent units and using AI to generate diff-based audits, you can surgically revert bugs without a Git history.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a legacy codebase, a tangled web of 'index_final_v2.js' files, and a client who needs a critical fix by morning. There is no Git log to blame, no history to revert to, and the previous developer left no documentation. The tension is palpable—one wrong line of code could collapse the entire fragile architecture.

But the era of manual, terrified debugging is over. By leveraging the analytical power of Claude Code alongside the simulation capabilities of Antigravity, you can reverse-engineer the state of any project, isolate regressions, and ship fixes with surgical precision. This is the blueprint for turning a chaotic, unversioned mess into a stable, production-ready deliverable.

steps.title: Establish a Baseline State
steps.description: Before changing code, use Claude Code to scan the directory and map the current execution flow. This prevents 'ghost bugs' caused by undocumented dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase structure and identify the primary entry point and all associated dependency chains. Generate a dependency map.

steps.title: Isolate the Faulty Module
steps.description: Use AI to identify the specific function responsible for the regression by simulating inputs and outputs without modifying the live environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite that simulates the user journey leading to the reported error, isolating the specific logic block that fails.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'isolate logic causing error in auth module'

steps.title: Generate a 'Shadow' Patch
steps.description: Create a temporary patch file rather than overwriting existing code. This acts as a manual version control layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a patch file for the identified bug that adheres to existing coding styles and maintains backward compatibility.

steps.title: Verify State Integrity
steps.description: Run an automated check to ensure your fix didn't introduce side effects elsewhere in the unversioned codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform an integrity check on the entire codebase, comparing current output against the baseline established in Step 1.

steps.title: Institutionalize the Fix
steps.description: Document the fix and the logic behind it, creating a synthetic audit trail for the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a markdown summary of the bug, the fix implemented, and a guide on how to prevent this regression in the future.

pro_tips: Always create a full directory copy before starting; treat this folder as your 'local origin' since you lack Git.
Use Claude Code to rename variables to descriptive names globally; it helps the AI understand the context of legacy code faster.
If the code is too large, use Antigravity to 'prune' the codebase, temporarily deleting non-essential files to reduce the token noise.
Force the AI to provide reasoning for every change; if it cannot explain why a line works, do not merge the patch.
Create a 'diff-log' text file manually; every time you run a command, append a timestamp and what changed to keep a human-readable history.
content.next_steps: Once the fix is verified, initialize a new Git repository in the project folder to ensure you never face the 'no version control' nightmare again.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start mastering them. Our community of high-output builders is waiting to help you scale your freelance business with elite AI workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
